cases.title: Scenario matrix row for attendance status assignment Present vs Late per policy windows
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Attendance status assignment block applies (FR-23, BR-11, BR-12, AC-11).
attendance-open-session fixture: Lecturer has opened a Scheduled session via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open (AC-01); session is Open with rotating valid QR token.
Effective policy defines presentWindowMinutes and lateWindowMinutes relative to session scheduled start.
Two authenticated enrolled students exist with no successful attendance record for the session.
steps: Resolve effective attendance policy for the open session and record present window end timestamp.
Student A submits check-in with valid qrToken while server check-in timestamp falls within present window.
Student B submits check-in with valid qrToken while server check-in timestamp falls after present window end but before session Closed.
Query AttendanceRecord and CheckInAttempt rows for both students.
cases.expected: Student A receives status Present with checkInMethod QR and recorded checkInAt; Student B receives status Late with checkInMethod QR and recorded checkInAt; both have CheckInAttempt outcome Success per AC-11 coverage row.

cases.title: Attendance ledger persists Present with QR method and timestamp within present window
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for policy resolution, check-in, and attendance ledger modules.
Open class session exists with valid qrToken; effective policy presentWindowMinutes=15 from scheduled start.
Authenticated enrolled student has no existing AttendanceRecord for (classSessionId, studentUserId).
Check-in timestamp is configured to fall within present window (e.g. scheduledStart + 5 minutes).
steps: Capture beforeState: student roster row is Pending with no success AttendanceRecord.
Invoke check-in command passing validation order steps 1–6 with valid qrToken and check-in time within present window.
Query attendance_records and check_in_attempts within the same transaction boundary.
Verify GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance roster row for the student.
cases.expected: BR-11 creates AttendanceRecord with attendanceStatus Present, checkInMethod QR, and non-null checkInAt; CheckInAttempt persists outcome Success; roster row reflects Present with latestAttemptOutcome Success.

cases.title: Attendance ledger persists Late with QR method when check-in occurs after present window
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for policy resolution, check-in, and attendance ledger modules.
Open class session exists with valid qrToken; effective policy presentWindowMinutes=15 and lateWindowMinutes=15 from scheduled start.
Authenticated enrolled student has no existing success AttendanceRecord for the session.
Check-in timestamp is configured after present window end but before session Closed (e.g. scheduledStart + 20 minutes).
steps: Capture beforeState: student roster row is Pending with no success AttendanceRecord.
Invoke check-in command passing all prior validation guards with check-in time in late window per BR-12.
Query attendance_records and check_in_attempts for status, checkInMethod, and checkInAt.
Verify roster counts increment late count via session attendance query.
cases.expected: BR-12 sets AttendanceRecord status Late with checkInMethod QR and stored checkInAt; CheckInAttempt outcome is Success; no Present status is assigned for this late-window submission.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord transitions Pending to Present or Late on successful QR check-in
preconditions: Open class session with valid qrToken exists in integration test database.
Authenticated enrolled student has AttendanceRecord in Pending state with no prior success.
Session state is Open per SM-02; effective policy windows are resolved for the session.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status is Pending for the student-session pair.
Submit check-in within present window and record afterState (status, checkInMethod, checkInAt).
Reset fixture or use second student; capture beforeState Pending again.
Submit check-in after present window end within late window and record afterState.
cases.expected: Present-window path: beforeState Pending transitions to afterState Present with checkInMethod QR. Late-window path: beforeState Pending transitions to afterState Late with checkInMethod QR; illegal transitions to Absent or Manual Present do not occur on success path.

cases.title: POST /v1/check-ins returns 200 with attendanceStatus Present or Late in success envelope
preconditions: Lecturer has opened session (AC-01); session is Open with valid qrToken.
Authenticated student bearer token belongs to actively enrolled user with no prior success for the session.
Test harness can control or observe check-in timing relative to policy present and late windows.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer token, valid qrToken, and clientTimestamp within present window.
Inspect HTTP status 200, response envelope data.outcome, data.attendanceStatus, data.checkInAt, and meta fields.
Repeat with second enrolled student and clientTimestamp after present window end within late window.
Inspect second response for attendanceStatus Late.
cases.expected: Present-window call returns 200 with data.outcome Success, data.attendanceStatus Present, and ISO-8601 data.checkInAt. Late-window call returns 200 with data.outcome Success and data.attendanceStatus Late; error is null in both envelopes per API design §4.4.

cases.title: E2E-02 primary workflow student check-in within present window records Present
preconditions: Lecturer opens Scheduled session via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open (AC-01).
Enrolled student completes login gate (AC-06) and passes enrollment validation (AC-07).
Student has no existing successful attendance for the session (AC-08 prerequisite satisfied).
Check-in occurs within present window while session remains Open.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open and obtains rotating qrPayload.
Student calls POST /v1/auth/login and receives Student role accessToken.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken within present window.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for the student row.
cases.expected: End-to-end happy path assigns Present with checkInMethod QR and checkInAt timestamp; roster shows student with attendanceStatus Present and latestAttemptOutcome Success; duplicate second submission remains out of scope for this case (AC-08).

cases.title: Alternate branch assigns Late when student checks in after present window before close
preconditions: Lecturer has opened session (AC-01); present window has elapsed but session is still Open.
Authenticated enrolled student has no successful attendance record.
Session has not been closed (AC-05 close would block new check-ins).
steps: Advance test clock or use fixture with scheduled start such that current time is after presentWindowMinutes but before late window end.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and Authorization header.
Student queries personal attendance or lecturer queries session roster.
Confirm session remains Open and student was not rejected with SessionClosed.
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds with attendanceStatus Late, checkInMethod QR, and checkInAt recorded; session state remains Open until lecturer close; student is not assigned Present for late-window timestamp.

cases.title: Present window boundary assigns Present at end inclusive and Late immediately after
preconditions: Open session with deterministic scheduled start and effective policy presentWindowMinutes=15 exists.
Two enrolled students (or sequential attempts with reset) have no prior success for the session.
Test harness supplies check-in timestamps at scheduledStart+15min (last instant of present window) and scheduledStart+15min+1s (first instant of late window).
steps: Submit POST /v1/check-ins for student A with check-in timestamp at present window end boundary.
Submit POST /v1/check-ins for student B with check-in timestamp one second after present window end.
Query AttendanceRecord status and checkInMethod for both students.
Verify CheckInAttempt outcomes are Success for both accepted submissions.
cases.expected: Boundary-at-end submission receives attendanceStatus Present per BR-11; immediately-after-boundary submission receives attendanceStatus Late per BR-12; both persist checkInMethod QR and timestamps without validation-order regression.

cases.title: Non-Student roles denied POST /v1/check-ins and cannot receive Present or Late assignment
preconditions: Open session with valid qrToken exists.
Lecturer and AcademicAdmin users are authenticated with valid bearer tokens.
Enrolled Student bearer token is available as authorized control.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and Authorization header.
AcademicAdmin calls POST /v1/check-ins with the same token context.
Enrolled Student calls POST /v1/check-ins within present window as control.
Query attendance_records for any Present/Late rows created for lecturer or admin user IDs.
cases.expected: Lecturer and AcademicAdmin receive 403 Forbidden per permission matrix (Submit QR check-in Deny); no Present/Late AttendanceRecord is created for non-student actors; Student control proceeds to status assignment per AC-11.

cases.title: CheckInResultScreen displays success-present or success-late with timestamp after QR check-in
preconditions: Student is authenticated on mobile web browser.
Open session QR check-in URL is available; fixtures support present-window and late-window scenarios.
Student has no prior successful attendance for the session.
steps: Navigate to student check-in flow and scan or open valid QR link for an open session.
Complete check-in submission within present window.
Verify CheckInResultScreen renders success-present variant with Present label and displayed check-in time.
Repeat flow in late-window scenario after present window elapses.
Verify CheckInResultScreen renders success-late warning variant with Late label and displayed check-in time.
cases.expected: Present path shows success-present UI state (Điểm danh thành công — Có mặt) with timestamp; Late path shows success-late UI state (Điểm danh thành công — Đi trễ) with timestamp; both outcomes use role=status aria-live region per UI states doc.
